article.title: 关于董事批准了Utopia项目迁移境外和成立技术委员会
article.meta: 发布时间：2026年3月31日 | 作者：Tensorlinx团队 | 分类：企业公告
content: Utopia项目已经完全从盈利公司中剥离出去，正式成为一个独立的开源组织。经董事会批准，Utopia项目将迁移至境外托管，并成立独立的技术委员会负责项目治理。
1. 托管与司法管辖区。Utopia项目关联的所有集成测试、包、仓库将迁移至境外托管设施。项目开发活动允许在境内境外进行（除关联美国OFAC制裁的基金外），且可受特定司法管辖区管辖（除关联美国OFAC制裁的基金外）。
2. 法律独立。Utopia技术委员会的所有法律行动与灵兮矩阵（上海）计算机系统有限公司无任何关联。
3. 基金会准入权限。Utopia技术委员会保留批准或拒绝基金会赞助申请的唯一权利。
4. 财务独立。Utopia技术委员会应通过设立公益实体或委托财务赞助基金处理财务事务，与本公司无任何关联。
5. 技术委员会组成。Utopia技术委员会候选人应基于技术贡献提名，并由社区选举产生。资助方/基金会可推荐不超过5%的候选人。最终任命权由技术委员会独立行使。

en.title: Regarding the Board's Approval of Utopia Project Migration Overseas and Establishment of Technical Committee - Tensorlinx
en.pageSubtitle: Stay informed about Tensorlinx's latest developments, technical breakthroughs, and industry insights

article.title: Regarding the Board's Approval of Utopia Project Migration Overseas and Establishment of Technical Committee
article.meta: Published: March 31, 2026 | Author: Tensorlinx Team | Category: Company Announcement
content: The Utopia Project has been completely spun off from the for-profit company and has officially become an independent open-source organization. Upon board approval, the Utopia Project will migrate to offshore hosting and establish an independent Technical Committee responsible for project governance.

1. Hosting and Jurisdiction. All integration tests, packages, and repositories associated with the Utopia Project shall be migrated to offshore hosting facilities. Project development activities are permitted both domestically and internationally (excluding funds affiliated with U.S. OFAC sanctions) and shall be subject to specific jurisdictions (excluding funds affiliated with U.S. OFAC sanctions).
2. Legal Separation. All legal actions of the Utopia Technical Committee shall bear no affiliation with Tensorlinx (Shanghai) Computer System Co., Ltd.
3. Foundation Admission Authority. The Utopia Technical Committee reserves the exclusive right to approve or reject foundation sponsorship applications.

4. Financial Independence. The Utopia Technical Committee shall handle financial matters through the establishment of public benefit entities or engagement of fiscal sponsorship funds, with no affiliation to the Company.

5. Technical Committee Composition. Candidates for the Utopia Technical Committee shall be nominated based on technical contributions and elected by the community. Sponsors/foundations may recommend no more than 5% of candidates. Final appointment authority shall be exercised independently by the Technical Committee.
